prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约 15258 名、17247 名、20054 名、21138 名、23010 名，呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 7752 名，年均后移约 1938 名；2025 年基准位次约 23010 名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划 2021 年 67 人、2022 年 63 人、2023 年 52 人、2024 年 56 人、2025 年 60 人，2026 年计划 62 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 3.3%，扩招对竞争压力有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 66 名（2025 年第 65 名、2024 年第 70 名），近年排名稳中有升，在财经类院校中位列前茅；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第 92 位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注度异常信号；近年亦无投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评 A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理获评 A、统计学获评 A-，财经主干学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度 2024 年为分化观望状态，整体平稳；山东省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 72 万人，较 2025 年约 68.1 万人增加约 3.9 万人（增幅约 5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在 437–444 分之间，2025 年为 441 分，波动较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（年均后移约 1900 名）、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+3.3%）对竞争略有缓解、但山东省考生总数明显增加（+5.7%）推高整体竞争烈度，以及学校财经学科优势稳固、声誉平稳等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 23010 名基础上继续后移，但后移幅度受扩招对冲而略小于近年均值；预测最低位次约 23270 名，区间 22770–23770 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学（注册会计师专门化方向）
- 法学（法学与金融学双学位）
- 会计学（双语实验班）
- 法学（法学与会计学双学位）
- 法学（法学与国商双学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学（国家经济学基础人才培养基地班）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学（大数据会计）、财务管理、审计学）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学）
- 计算机科学与技术（基础学科拔尖实验班）
- 金融学（经管国际化创新实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（证券与期货方向）、金融学（双语实验班）、信用管理、投资学）
- 数字经济（基础学科拔尖实验班）
- 金融学类（保险方向）
- 计算机类（人工智能、计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 统计学类（统计学、数据科学）
- 经济与贸易类
- 工商管理类（工商管理、工商管理（双语实验班）、市场营销、旅游管理、供应链管理、人力资源管理）
- 管理科学与工程类（计算金融、大数据管理与应用、信息管理与信息系统）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 23270 名，区间 22770–23770 名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业为主力填报（经济学基地班、工商管理类（会计学院）、财政学类等），一档专业（注会、法学双学位等）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（22770 名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（23770 名附近）应以三档专业保底，优先选择金融学类、统计学类等学科评估高且社会热度偏好的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 15258, 17247, 20054, 21138, and 23010, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7752 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 1938 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 23010; the university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 67 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 56 in 2024, 60 in 2025, and 62 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.3% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 66th in 2026 (65th in 2025, 70th in 2024), with a stable and slightly rising trend in recent years, ranking among the top in finance and economics institutions; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (rated as average), with short video platform exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal signals of application attention; there have been no records of admission score line breaks in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, with outstanding strength in core finance and economics disciplines, providing sustained appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/finance/economics majors in 2024 is in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, overall stable; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line (regular class first segment) has been stable between 437–444 points in recent years, with 441 points in 2025, showing small fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (average annual backward shift of about 1900 places), the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.3%) slightly alleviating competition, but the significant increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%) raising overall competition intensity, and the university's stable advantages in finance and economics disciplines and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 23010, but the magnitude of the backward shift will be slightly smaller than the recent average due to the offsetting effect of expansion; the predicted minimum ranking is about 23270, with a range of 22770–23770.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Accounting (Certified Public Accountant Specialization)
- Law (Law and Finance Dual Degree)
- Accounting (Bilingual Experimental Class)
- Law (Law and Accounting Dual Degree)
- Law (Law and International Business Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (National Economics Basic Talent Training Base Class)
- Business Administration (School of Accounting) (Accounting (Big Data Accounting), Financial Management, Auditing)
- Finance and Taxation (Finance, Taxation)
- Computer Science and Technology (Basic Discipline Top-Notch Experimental Class)
- Finance (Economics and Management International Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (Securities and Futures Direction), Finance (Bilingual Experimental Class), Credit Management, Investment)
- Digital Economy (Basic Discipline Top-Notch Experimental Class)
- Finance (Insurance Direction)
- Computer (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, Network Space Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Statistics (Statistics, Data Science)
- Economics and Trade
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Business Administration (Bilingual Experimental Class), Marketing, Tourism Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Resource Management)
- Management Science and Engineering (Computational Finance, Big Data Management and Application, Information Management and Information Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 23270, range 22770–23770. It is recommended that candidates within the ranking range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Economics Base Class, Business Administration (School of Accounting), Finance and Taxation, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (CPA, Law Dual Degree, etc.) as a sprint; candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 22770) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 23770) should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing majors such as Finance, Statistics, etc., which have high discipline evaluations and favorable social popularity.
